query:
SELECT
             (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bytes), 0) FROM workspace_storage_usage WHERE workspace_id = $1)::bigint as "committed!",
             COALESCE(
               (SELECT MIN(computed_at) FROM workspace_storage_usage WHERE workspace_id = $1) < now() - interval '10 minutes',
               true) as "stale!",
             (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(GREATEST(inflight_bytes - target_existing_size, 0)), 0)
                FROM workspace_multipart_inflight
                WHERE workspace_id = $1 AND created_at > now() - ($2::text)::interval
                  AND ($3::text IS NULL OR upload_id <> $3))::bigint as "reserved!"
